---
title: "ICI → CKD Cohort Study"
subtitle: "Data Management & Analysis Pipeline"
---

## Project overview

This site publishes the Quarto pipeline for a retrospective cohort study
examining **chronic kidney disease (CKD) outcomes following immune checkpoint
inhibitor (ICI) therapy**.

The pipeline has two stages:

| Stage | File | Role |
|---|---|---|
| **Data management** | [`data_management.qmd`](data_management.qmd) | Load raw ICI starts + RPDR files, derive demographics, comorbidities, labs, eGFR trajectories, CKD / ESKD / AKI outcomes, competing-risk status |
| **Analysis** | [`analysis.qmd`](analysis.qmd) | Baseline characteristics, yearly tables, CIF curves, logistic regression, Fine-Gray competing-risk models, cause-specific Cox models, overall survival by cancer type |

## Cohort

| Step | N |
|---|---|
| Raw ICI starts | 25,397 |
| After merging demographics | 20,383 |
| Remove no baseline creatinine | 18,319 |
| Remove pre-existing ESRD/KT and eGFR < 10 | 18,157 |
| Remove labs after ICI-only | 17,937 |
| Remove 216 placebo | 17,721 |
| Remove 3 pre-ICI death RPDR errors | **17,718** |

## Data privacy

Patient-level identifiers (`EMPI`, `MRN`, names, dates of birth) never appear
in any rendered output. Rendered tables and plots contain only aggregate
summaries well above the small-cell threshold; all cell counts shown are
institutional-level cohort statistics.

Raw RPDR extracts and clinical Excel files remain local — only the rendered
code and aggregate results are published here.

## Data sources (local only, not in this repo)

- `ICI_starts_downloaded_1127.xlsx` — Hospital ICI starts registry
- RPDR extracts (Lab / Dem / Med / Dia) — Mass General Brigham Research Patient
  Data Registry, pulled 2025-09-30
- `cancer_type_clean.xlsx` — Curated tumor-category mapping

## Dependencies

Core R packages used across the pipeline: `tidyverse`, `dplyr`, `readxl`,
`writexl`, `gtsummary`, `table1`, `survival`, `tidycmprsk`, `ggsurvfit`,
`ggplot2`, `sqldf`.
